001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
004import java.util.List;
005
006/**
007 * Service providing CRUD-style operations for {@link IssueType} entities.
008 */
009public interface IssueTypeService {
010
011  /**
012   * Returns all issue types.
013   *
014   * @return list of issue types.
015   */
016  List<IssueType> getAll();
017
018  /**
019   * Returns an issue type by tag.
020   *
021   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
022   * @return issue type.
023   */
024  IssueType getByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag);
025
026  /**
027   * Updates the description for an issue type.
028   *
029   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
030   * @param newIssueTypeDescription new description text.
031   * @return updated entity.
032   */
033  IssueType updateIssueTypeDescription(String issueTypeTag, String newIssueTypeDescription);
034
035  /**
036   * Deletes an issue type if it is not currently referenced by any reports.
037   *
038   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
039   */
040  void deleteUnusedIssueType(String issueTypeTag);
041
042  /**
043   * Creates a new issue type.
044   *
045   * @param newIssueType issue type to create.
046   * @return created entity.
047   */
048  IssueType createNewIssueType(IssueType newIssueType);
049}
